user.title: Shark IQ Login
user.description:
1. Open this URL in your browser:

{authorize_url}

2. Log in with your SharkClean account (solve captcha if needed)
3. After login, the browser will redirect to a `com.sharkninja.shark://` URL that won't load
4. Copy the FULL URL from the address bar and paste it below

Tokens are saved and auto-refreshed, so you only need to do this once.

error.no_code: No authorization code found in URL. Copy the full callback URL including the ?code= parameter.
error.auth_failed: Auth0 token exchange failed. The code may have expired — try starting over.
error.ayla_failed: Connected to Auth0 but Ayla token exchange failed. SharkNinja services may be down.

abort.already_configured: This Shark account is already configured.
